text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the press conference for the upcoming
Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
You were particularly impressive in the Asahi Hai
F.S. How do you feel going into the Satsuki Sho?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I think I'm going to have to run as hard as I
can.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
In your last race, there were only five runners,
correct?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, y-yes...

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Some people are saying it was your overwhelming
ability that made your rivals avoid the race.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to the Hot Rod to win a race before it's
even started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Phew... That was exhausting for some reason.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I guess a press conference for a Classic would
make anyone nervous. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's all good in the neighborhood!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now, I would say it's about time to get training,
but...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit late to start now, so why don't we take
the rest of the day off and go for a drive instead?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Maruzensky and I suddenly end up
going for a drive.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yahoooo! I love driving!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The sound of the wind and this scenery speeding
by... I could just keep driving forever!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Trainer, are you listening? You look like
you're sleeping.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Trainer, are you listening? You look like
you're sleeping.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Maybe a touch more speed will wake you up!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Whoops! I guess I got a little carried away. How
far have we been driving?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's just so fun to burn rubber in Tata!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's easy to see how much Maruzensky enjoys
driving her beloved car, but something feels off...
choice_data_list: Is running not as fun as it used to be?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heh... You really can read me like a book.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But, yeah... I've been having a little less of a good
time with racing recently.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I had so much fun when I first debuted.
Competing with everyone at full speed and all
that...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
For the first time, I was so immersed in running
that there were days I'd even forget to go for a
drive!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But while I was enjoying myself, the others were
running for completely different reasons...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You saw it too, right? How pained that poor girl
looked when she said she wanted to avoid racing
against me...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You saw it too, right? How pained that poor girl
looked when she said she wanted to avoid racing
against me...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I'm left with almost no one to run with.
Where's the fun to be had in that?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know I shouldn't say this right before the
Classics...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But maybe it's better if I don't run...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not run? I'm sure she was feeling the same way in
the previous race too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it's also true that I became her trainer
because of her fantastic running.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Backwards? Are you saying it's better if I do run?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But everyone's been avoiding races because of
me...
choice_data_list: Hey, what do you like about your car?
Hey, what do you like about your car?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh? You mean Tata?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I like her overwhelming speed and acceleration,
and the way driving her makes me feel like I'm
becoming one with the wind.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She has thrills you can't experience in an ordinary
car.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...I run like Tata?
choice_data_list:
There's something I want you to see. Let's go
back to the academy!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What is it?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So, what is it you want to show me?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Oh, someone's still running at this hour.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That's a new record, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really?! Woo-hoo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hopefully I can make my debut soon if I keep
improving at this rate.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to become an Umamusume to rival
Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Rival her? I want to surpass her!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Okay, would you time me next?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sure! Let's see some hustle out there, Grass!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Those kids...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some may be intimidated by Maruzensky, but
them?
choice_data_list: They're running to catch up with you.
They're running to catch up with you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Is that why they're up this late?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt that Maruzensky has had a
positive effect on the younger students.
choice_data_list: Let's show everyone a run to chase after!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, get everyone to run after me, huh... You
really are something else, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, get everyone to run after me, huh... You
really are something else, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It still feels a little strange to see how much they
look up to me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But it is nice to know that everyone wants to
catch up to me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, I trust you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, I trust you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to show everyone such amazing racing
that they'll have no choice but to come for me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'll go for it full throttle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Maruzensky's determination restored, she's
ready to tackle the Satsuki Sho.
